app.name: CoinPilot
app.tagline: Clear money planning for solo and couple life

login.title: Take control of your finances
login.subtitle: Track personal and shared expenses, define net income, reserve investment money, and review your monthly balance from one clean workspace.
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to the future platform Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
login.featureOne: Personal, partner, and shared expense ownership
login.featureTwo: Simple monthly analytics you can actually use
login.featureThree: Architecture ready for Supabase, deployment, and growth

dashboard.title: Financial dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A high-level view of income, expenses, investment, and remaining balance.
dashboard.monthlyTrendHint: How total expenses evolve month by month.
dashboard.categoryHint: Current spend distribution across your categories.
dashboard.noData: There is no data yet. Start by creating your first expense.

expense.title: Add expense
expense.subtitle: Capture a new expense with owner, category, amount, date, and an optional note.

transactions.title: Transaction history
transactions.subtitle: Browse recorded expenses and search by note or category.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update names, usage mode, income, investment, categories, language, and currency.
settings.profileHint: Define the people participating in this financial workspace.
settings.householdHint: Invite your partner to track expenses and analytics together.
settings.inviteCodeHint: Share this code with your partner. It expires in 48 hours.
settings.joinHouseholdHint: Enter the code shared with you to link accounts.
settings.alreadyInHousehold: You are already in a shared household with another person.
settings.financialHint: These values feed the dashboard and monthly projections.
settings.categoriesHint: Add and remove categories based on your real life.
settings.macroCategoriesHint: Group your establishments to define monthly budget limits.
settings.establishmentsHint: Manage where you spend and configure fixed payments.
